calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ASSET CAPITAL RECOVERY GROUP, LLC, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

Defendant Boriana Dimonte-Protleff's claim of exemption is GRANTED IN PART.

The levying officer/sheriff is directed to release $500 to the plaintiff creditor. Any other sums that the levying officer is holding shall be released to the defendant. $125 per pay period (every two weeks) shall be withheld from defendant's earnings to service plaintiff's judgment. It is notable that a judgment must be given priority over, for example, most installment payments.

Court to prepare order.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Continued To Apr-10-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2017 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set February 6, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
